title: Artificial Intelligence and Biosecurity Issues

title: Unemployment Insurance: Legislative Issues in the 119th Congress
summary: The Unemployment Insurance (UI) system is a joint federal-state partnership that consists of two types of benefits: (1) permanently authorized programs, including the Unemployment Compensation (UC) and Extended Benefit (EB) programs; and (2) temporary federal UI benefits created by congressional action to supplement the UC and EB programs during recessions. The U.S. Department of Labor (DOL) provides oversight of...

title: Pooling Europe's compute
summary: Frontier AI training has needed compute at one site, hard in Europe given power, chip and political limits. RAND Europe finds distributed training eases the power and political constraints and pools Europe's scattered chips, but adds no new chips.
